arts.ttl: Stevenage beaten 1-0 by Mansfield - FA Cup player ratings
arts.sum: Got forward like he used to in the first half, at one point he was almost the furthest forward when Stevenage won the ball high up the pitch, but unusually was a little shaky in defence and caught out every now and then. Stevenage won't have that experience this time round, they probably should, but they didn't take their chances in the 1-0 loss at home to Mansfield Town and the Stags did.

Stevenage are rapidly sliding down the League One table with a five-game winless run leaving them just four points above the relegation zone. The Boro have not tasted victory at home for more than tw...
